title: SentinelResult
description: A8 Escalation Sentinel result (01-TECH_SPEC §5). Classes per PRD §6.2; class 1 (wellbeing) bypasses queue ordering and fires push+SMS synchronously.

class.description: Escalation class per PRD §6.2 (1 wellbeing, 2 family conflict, 3 integrity, 4 low confidence, 5 model refusal).
